author: ppeirce
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Display inline annotations for note properties in daily notes.

manifest.author: Peter Peirce
manifest.description: Display inline annotations for note properties in daily notes.
manifest.name: Property Annotations

name: Property Annotations

releases.author: ppeirce
releases.description:
Initial release of Property Annotations

**Features:**
- Boolean frontmatter annotations in daily notes
- Shows time since last true value (e.g., "3 days since last")
- Configurable label styles (verbose/compact)
- Key filtering (all keys or whitelist)
- Auto-detection of daily notes settings
- Live preview and reading mode support
releases.name: v0.1.0
